step_rationale: Pyruvate dehydrogenase inhibitor promoting glycolysis in ischemic cardiomyocytes; reduces post-MI remodeling.
mechanism: PDK1 shifts myocardial metabolism toward glycolysis during ischemia, limiting oxidative stress and cardiomyocyte necrosis.

references.title: LCZ696 (sacubitril/valsartan mixture) promotes cardiac repair and reverses residual remodelling of surgical ventricular reconstruction in post-myocardial infarction mice by targeting circMap4k2/LIN28A/PDK1 pathway.
